meta.description: Standalone export of the build-a-drone configurator component inventory (buildable drone parts only). Does not include shop.html prebuilt drones (Atlas Pro, Vista 6K, Titan X8, Ember IR, Volt FPV Kit, Spark Micro Kit), the COTS Part Bin on shop.html, Education programs, or Merch — those are intentionally excluded and remain OrbitWorks-only.

pricing.notes: Pricing logic from the OrbitWorks configurator: parts subtotal, plus labor fee (30% of parts subtotal, $99 minimum), plus NY State sales tax (8%, Broome County NY) applied to (parts + labor). These constants are OrbitWorks-specific (assembly labor + NY tax) and will likely need to be replaced with WPM-specific labor and tax rules when imported.

selectionModes.single: Only one item may be selected per category (radio-style).
selectionModes.multi: Multiple items may be selected per category, each with its own quantity (checkbox + qty).

fieldNotes.compat: Airframe compatibility class (fixed-wing: micro/small/medium/large; multirotor: tri/5q/7q/10q/hex/hexl/octo). Used to filter flight controllers, ESCs, and motors.
fieldNotes.fit: Restricts an item to a given airframe type: fw (fixed wing), mr (multirotor), or all.
fieldNotes.forFrame: List of airframe compat classes a motor is offered for.
fieldNotes.perMotor: If 1, the ESC is priced/quantified per motor. If 0, a single 4-in-1 ESC unit covers up to 4 motors.
fieldNotes.autoQty: On the motor category — quantity automatically follows the airframe motor count (1 for fixed wing, or the multirotor frame motors count).
fieldNotes.vtol: If set on a fixed-wing airframe, that airframe supports the optional VTOL conversion kit.
fieldNotes.price: 0 indicates a "none/skip" placeholder option within a category, not a free item.
